sistema-gestor-lecturas.title: Reading Management System
sistema-gestor-lecturas.description: Web application built with Django and MariaDB for managing readings, books, and personal goals. It allows registering literary works, tracking reading progress, taking notes while reading, and visualizing statistics through a modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript interface.

challenges: Design a data model for progressive goals (yearly, monthly, per-book)
Implement the stats panel with efficient aggregate queries
Handle differentiated admin/user permissions without third-party packages
learned: How to structure a medium-scale Django project without falling into a monolith
Template composition patterns with {% include %} and {% extends %}
The value of tests: this project doesn't have them, the next one will

automatizacion-flujos.title: Automation & Workflows
automatizacion-flujos.description: Creation of automated workflows with n8n to optimize repetitive processes in professional and academic environments, integrating services and databases with minimal friction.

challenges: Design workflows resilient to external service failures
Balance the power of n8n with the maintainability of the adjacent Python code
Version and document flows so other devs can iterate on them
learned: When low-code is the right call, and when to drop down to pure Python
The hidden cost of 'magical' integrations that fail silently
How to debug a distributed workflow without centralized logs
